meaning: v.(使)滑动,(使)滑行n.滑,滑动,幻灯片
examples: Eric lost his footing and began to slide into the pit.
Sarah's hair was out of her face and held back by a hair slide.
Most important, exports have continued their slide, which accelerated in the first two months of the current quarter.
This comes despite the sharp run-up in silver prices that preceded the latest two-day slide.
